_comment: Syntax Corporation © 2026 — EBS PAF Agent skill v2.0.0 (2026.06.11). OPTIONAL settings-level hook wiring. The PRIMARY wiring is the SKILL.md frontmatter; enable exactly ONE of the two or every gate fires twice. To use this instead: merge the 'hooks' object into <project>/.claude/settings.json after scaffold_enforcement.py has installed .claude/paf-hooks/.
